title: Update man pages and output for kpod images
body:
The size had a precision of 4, but wanted a precision of 3
to match the output of docker images
Updated the man page with more examples
Vendored in new version of docker/go-units to allow
for customized precisions

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Changes LGTM, tests are unhappy.  Thanks for the man page touch ups!

:pushpin: Commit c0d98bd has been approved by `rhatdan`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
